title: Hisham Dismisses Khalid b. 'Abd al-Malik from al-Madinah
description: 'Abd al-Malik from al-Madinah (1592) In this year, Hisham b. 'Abd al-Malik dismissed Khalid b. 'Abd al-Malik b. al-Harith b. al-Hakam from (the governorship of) alMadinah, appointing to it Muhammad b. Hisham b. Ismail. According to al-Wagidi: On the day Khilid was dismissed from

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
